title: Demorchis isabelensis

This classification places Demorchis isabelensis within the flowering plant order Asparagales. The family Orchidaceae is further divided into subfamilies and tribes based on morphological characteristics. Demorchis isabelensis, like other orchids, is classified within the kingdom Plantae.
